description: Verify that the system satisfies: Conduct hazard analysis for each type of food manufactured or processed

expected_output.details: System demonstrates compliance with: Conduct hazard analysis for each type of food manufactured or processed

steps: 1. Locate documentation relevant to REQ-117.130-001A (21 CFR 117.130).
2. Verify the facility has addressed: Conduct hazard analysis for each type of food manufactured or processed.
3. Review written records or system outputs for evidence of compliance.
4. Compare actual output against expected compliance state.
5. Record PASS if compliant, FAIL with details if not.
notes: Derived from 21 CFR 117.130, parent requirement: REQ-117.130-001. Atomic rule: REQ-117.130-001A.
